title: PUT /books/{id} cannot set year=0 or clear string fields
evidence: app.go:220-231 treats Go zero-values (year==0, empty title/author/isbn) as "unset" and keeps the existing value, so a client cannot explicitly set year to 0 or clear isbn
suggestion: Use pointer fields (*int, *string) in UpdateBookRequest to distinguish omitted from zero-value

title: Hardcoded relative SQLite path './books.db'
evidence: app.go:45 sql.Open("sqlite3", "./books.db") — path is fixed, not configurable via env/flag
suggestion: Read the DB path from an env var (e.g. DB_PATH) with a sensible default

title: Test suite exceeds the 3-test minimum with 13 handler tests
evidence: app_test.go — 13 Test* functions covering CRUD, validation, author filter, not-found, invalid-id, and empty-list paths
suggestion: None — coverage of error paths is a strength (test_coverage=0.593)

title: Defensive whitespace validation beyond Gin binding
evidence: app.go:91-98 re-checks strings.TrimSpace(title/author) after ShouldBindJSON's binding:required, rejecting whitespace-only values
suggestion: None — this correctly handles whitespace-only input
